name: PACK THEIF (Pants)
description: Thief-style unboxing — sneaky character stealing pants from a box, street fashion energy.

steps.prompt: Streetwear thief aesthetic. Someone is pulling a pair of pants out of a shipping box or package dramatically. Urban street background, hooded figure, cinematic low-angle shot, the pants are the hero item shown prominently. Graffiti background, cinematic color grade, high fashion streetwear energy. The pants product is clearly visible and detailed.

Streetwear thief video. A hooded character dramatically pulls the pants out of a box, holds them up to admire, turns them to show both sides. Urban street setting, cinematic camera move around the product, streetwear fashion energy, the pants are shown clearly throughout.
